description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a boundary wall, featuring a lush front garden with trees and shrubs, and a gated entrance. The structure includes multiple rooms with visible interior furnishings, such as bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and bathrooms. The front facade is marked by a green gate and a small porch area, while the rear side opens to a patio with palm trees and a shaded outdoor seating area. The roof is flat, and the exterior walls are painted in a light beige color, complemented by green accents on the gate and lower wall. Large windows and doors provide ample natural light, and the layout is open and accessible. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, front garden, green gate, and open-plan interior, surrounded by a boundary wall and featuring palm trees and a shaded patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green gate, front garden, main entrance, and a clear view of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boundary wall, rear patio with palm trees, and the shaded outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, palm trees, and the back entrance with a shaded area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, boundary wall, and windows along the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
